title: Genie One enhancements
body:
* **Workspace instructions for chat in Genie One**: Workspace admins can now create a `/Workspace/.genie_workspace_instructions.md` file to add custom instructions that apply to all chat conversations in the workspace. See [Chat in Genie One](/aws/en/genie-one/chat).
* **Atlassian and Glean MCP connections (Beta)**: You can now connect chat in Genie One to the Atlassian and Glean MCPs from within the chat box.
* **Server-sent events support (Public Preview)**: Externally hosted MCP servers that use server-sent events are now supported.
